data.name: AiTokenizerBase_EOSToken_Tooltip
data.value: The ID of the end-of-sequence token used by the model to stop text generation. Default is 50256 for GPT-2 compatible models.

data.name: AssociatedFlowBlockRequired_ValidationMessage
data.value: "{0}" must be set or a previous flow block of type "{1}" must exist in the flow.

data.name: BaseFlowBlock_AssociatedIterationContext_Tooltip
data.value: Defines the flow block whose iteration lifecycle controls this block. When multiple incoming paths exist, the iteration context is automatically set to the first common flow block across all paths and cannot be changed. If only one flow block is connected, the iteration context can be selected manually. All inputs are collected during the referenced block's iteration and this flow block executes once the iteration has completed.

data.name: BaseFlowBlock_DefaultDescription
data.value: In this area you can configure all required settings for the “{0}” flow block. Make the desired adjustments and then click “Apply” to save your changes.

data.name: BaseFlowBlock_GenerationStrategies_Tooltip
data.value: Generation strategies automatically derive values or configuration settings for this flow block. They run on test datasets, build concrete input from the current flow chain, and validate the generated result against the defined test expectations.

data.name: BaseFlowBlock_InheritRequirementsNotMet
data.value: Activate only if a predecessor is active

data.name: BaseFlowBlock_TestDefinitions_Tooltip
data.value: Test definitions describe verifiable scenarios for this flow block. For required fields, you can either set constant values or derive expected values from the complete flow chain. The resulting input values are then used to execute tests in a test-driven design workflow.

data.name: BertTokenizer_Description
data.value: Uses a BERT-format vocabulary to tokenize text.

data.name: BertTokenizer_VocabFile_Tooltip
data.value: Path to the vocabulary (.txt) file for the BERT tokenizer.

data.name: BpeAiTokenizer_Description
data.value: Uses byte pair encoding (BPE) with vocab.json and merges.txt to tokenize text for transformer models.

data.name: ComparisonOperator_GreaterThanOrEquals
data.value: is greater than or equal to

data.name: ComparisonOperator_LowerThanOrEquals
data.value: is less than or equal to

data.name: ConcatUriFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Joins multiple URI parts into a fully resolved URL.

data.name: CounterFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Flow block that generates numeric or alphanumeric values and passes them to subsequent flow blocks.

data.name: DataTableBase_FirstRowHeader
data.value: The first row contains the column headers

data.name: DecisionFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Flow block for conditional path execution based on configurable decision rules.

data.name: DecisionFlowBlock_Validation_DuplicateFields
data.value: The following fields were used multiple times: {0}

data.name: DistributorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Receives a single input value and distributes it to any number of defined output field values.

data.name: DistributorFlowBlock_DisributedFields
data.value: Distribute value from input field to the following fields

data.name: DownloaderFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Flow block for downloading files from the internet using a URL.

data.name: EnumerationFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Outputs each linked parameter value individually.

data.name: EnumerationFlowBlock_Parameters_Tooltip
data.value: Fields whose values should be output individually.

data.name: ExecuteSQLFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Executes an SQL command on an external database connection.

data.name: FileOpenMode_Dialog_Message
data.value: Please choose how to open the file:

data.name: FileReaderFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Reads contents from a file for further processing.

data.name: FlowBlockMainView_ApplyFailed_Message
data.value: Saving could not be completed due to a technical error. Please check the log files for more information.

data.name: FlowBlockMainView_InvalidName_Message
data.value: Please enter a valid label for your flow block.

data.name: FlowBloxComponentNameValidator_FieldSourceNotSet
data.value: The field element has no source.

data.name: FlowBloxComponentNameValidator_NameAlreadyExists
data.value: A component with the identifier "{0}" already exists.

data.name: FormatFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Formats text or numeric values using placeholders according to .NET formatting rules. See: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/base-types/composite-formatting

data.name: FormatFlowBlock_Validation_InvalidFieldElementCount
data.value: The number of format parameters ({0}) does not match the number of linked field elements ({1}).

data.name: Global_DependencyViolation_Message
data.value: The delete action cannot be performed because it would violate existing dependencies: {0}

data.name: Global_DependencyViolation_Message_Entry
data.value: The component to be deleted "{0}" is used by "{1}"

data.name: Global_FilterMethodNotFound_Message
data.value: The selection method '{0}' was not found in the target class '{1}'.

data.name: Global_MissingDisplayAttributes_Message
data.value: The following types do not have a DisplayAttribute: {0}

data.name: Global_MissingFilterMethod_Message
data.value: No selection method (SelectionFilterMethod) was defined for the property '{0}'.

data.name: Global_NoItemsFound_Message
data.value: No selectable objects could be found.

data.name: Global_SelectionDialog_Message
data.value: Please select an entry from the list.

data.name: RecursiveCallFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Calls a target flow block and transfers defined output field values from the input flow block using a configurable field mapping. All output fields of the target flow block must be covered by a mapping. This flow block is particularly suitable for implementing repeated processes. Note that the target flow block must be on the path of the input flow block.

data.name: RecursiveCallFlowBlock_Validation_TargetNotReachable
data.value: The target flow block must lie on the current execution path.

data.name: RecursiveCallFlowBlock_Validation_UnmappedFields
data.value: All fields of the target flow block must be mapped. Mappings are missing for the following fields: {0}

data.name: JoinFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Combines multiple inputs into a consolidated output.

data.name: JoinFlowBlock_Validation_ManySeparatorsDefined
data.value: More than one separator was specified. Please specify either a separator or a special separator.

data.name: JoinFlowBlock_Validation_NoSeparatorDefined
data.value: No separator was specified. Please specify either a separator or a special separator.

data.name: JsonObjectFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Creates a JSON object from the given JSON text and makes it available to subsequent flow blocks.

data.name: JsonObjectOutputFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Outputs a JSON object and stores it in the output field.

data.name: JsonObjectWriterFlowBlock_AssociatedJsonObjectWriter
data.value: JSON object (via "Write JSON object" flow block)

data.name: JsonObjectWriterFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Creates a new JSON object if needed, or updates an existing one using JSON assignments. To add array elements, set Path to the array property and define element values via JSON assignments.

data.name: JsonObjectWriterFlowBlock_JsonAssignments_Tooltip
data.value: List of property assignments applied to the target JSON object. Each row maps exactly one property name to one value (static or field-based). Do not paste a complete JSON document into a single value.

data.name: JsonObjectWriterFlowBlock_Path_Tooltip
data.value: Path to the target node where the object should be created or updated. Use '/' to separate segments; object properties by name, array entries by index (e.g. 'participants/0'). For array appends, set Path to the array property (e.g. 'participants') and describe element properties with JSON assignments. Empty path targets the root object.

data.name: JsonObjectWriterFlowBlock_IsArray_Tooltip
data.value: If enabled and the path does not exist yet, an array is created at Path and a new object element is added to it. If disabled, a JSON object is created at Path.

data.name: JsonPathSelectorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Reads a JSON object and returns the value or values that match the specified JSON path.

data.name: JsonPropertyValueAssignment_IsArray_Tooltip
data.value: Indicates whether the target JSON property should be treated as an array. If enabled, each evaluated assignment value is appended to that array instead of replacing the property.

data.name: JsonPropertyValueAssignment_Value_Tooltip
data.value: Value for the target property path (field placeholders supported). Direct JSON is not supported here: create one mapping entry per property assignment. Missing parent paths are created automatically.

data.name: ListFactoryBase_NoDataAvailable_Text
data.value: No records available. Use the "+" button to add entries to the table.

data.name: ListViewSplitModeFactory_NoElementSelected_Text
data.value: Please select an element from the list to view its details.

data.name: LlamaAiTokenizer_Description
data.value: Uses the LLaMA tokenization model (SentencePiece) to convert text to and from token IDs. Supports special token mappings such as replacing the “Ġ” character with a space.

data.name: LlamaAiTokenizer_TokenizerModelPath_Tooltip
data.value: Specify the full path to the SentencePiece tokenizer model (.model) to be used for LLaMA.

data.name: NoteFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Used to insert comments or notes into the flow diagram.

data.name: OnnxBaseFlowBlock_AssociatedOnnxFlowBlock_Tooltip
data.value: Reuses the existing inference session of the selected ONNX flow block, if available.

data.name: OnnxQuestionAnsweringFlowBlock_PositionSelectionStrategy_Tooltip
data.value: Defines how the best start and end positions are chosen from logits – e.g., via ArgMax or a custom evaluation method.

data.name: OnnxTextGenerationFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Executes an ONNX model with a given prompt using a selected tokenizer.

data.name: OnnxTextGenerationFlowBlock_MaxTokens
data.value: Maximum number of tokens to generate

data.name: OnnxTextGenerationFlowBlock_TokenSelectionStrategy_Tooltip
data.value: Determines how the next token is selected during text generation. 'ArgMax' always chooses the most likely token. 'Sample' randomly selects based on probability distribution.

data.name: PDF2TextFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Reads a PDF document from the specified data source and returns the extracted plain text by pages.

data.name: Phi2AiTokenizer_Description
data.value: Uses the Phi-2 tokenizer model for tokenizing and detokenizing text for AI inference.

data.name: Phi2AiTokenizer_TokenizerConfiguration_Tooltip
data.value: Select the vocabulary/merges tokenizer to be used with the Phi-2 model.

data.name: ProjectPanel_AssignFlowBlockName_Description
data.value: Please enter the name of the Flow Block.

data.name: PropertyNames_EncodingName_Tooltip
data.value: Select the text encoding used to convert characters to and from byte sequences.

data.name: PropertyWindo_ApplyFailed_Message
data.value: Saving could not be completed due to a technical error. Please check the log files for more information.

data.name: RegexSelectorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Flow Block for selecting text patterns using regular expressions.

data.name: RobertaQATokenizer_Description
data.value: Tokenizes text for question-answering models using Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) based on vocab.json and merges.txt, following the sentence format typical for RoBERTa models.

data.name: SequenceDetectionFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Detects predefined sequences within an input text based on recurring structural patterns. Sequence detection is especially useful for structured content where the overall structure remains the same while the actual values change, for example HTML pages with identical layout but different content depending on the URL or page request. At least two test cases must be defined under "Test cases", each specifying an expected value and an expected number of occurrences. Based on these expectations, a hierarchical pattern is derived to reliably extract the desired value. Additional test cases are used to verify that the derived pattern works consistently across other pages with the same structure.

data.name: SequenceDetectionFlowBlock_Validation_MaxSequenceGenerationRuntimeSeconds
data.value: The maximum runtime of sequence generation must be at least one second.

data.name: SQLTable_DbType_Tooltip
data.value: The type of the database (e.g., MSSQL, MySQL, Oracle, SQLite).

data.name: SQLTable_SQLConnectionstring_Tooltip
data.value: The connection string used to establish the database connection.

data.name: SQLTable_SQLStatement_Tooltip
data.value: The SQL query used to read the table data. Parameters can be defined via fields.

data.name: StartEndPatternSelectorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Selects content between defined start and end patterns from a text.

data.name: StartFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Initial entry point for executing a flow diagram.

data.name: TableReaderFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Reads structured data from a table for further processing.

data.name: TableWriterFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Writes structured data to a table for later use.

data.name: TableWriterFlowBlock_Validation_DuplicateColumnNames
data.value: Duplicates found in column identifiers: {0}. Each column identifier must be unique.

data.name: TextBoxWithOptionalButtonsCreator_EnableFieldSelection_Tooltip
data.value: Insert field or replace selected text

data.name: TiktokenAiTokenizer_Description
data.value: Uses tiktoken tokenization with preconfigured vocabulary and encoding for GPT-based models.

data.name: TiktokenAiTokenizer_ModelName_Tooltip
data.value: Specifies the name of the GPT model to be used for tokenization (e.g., gpt2, gpt-neo, gpt-3.5).

data.name: TokenizerBase_TokenTranslations_Tooltip
data.value: Optional mapping for transforming characters after decoding

data.name: UserFieldObjectManager_Description
data.value: Custom fields can be used as input parameters and also serve to temporarily store information during project execution. They can be set manually as well as passed via arguments (e.g., when using FlowBlox.CLI) and can be read and modified at runtime.

data.name: VocabMergesConfiguration_MergesFile_Tooltip
data.value: Optional: Select the merges file directly if no directory is specified.

data.name: VocabMergesConfiguration_TokenizerDirectory_Tooltip
data.value: Select a directory that contains the files “vocab.json” and “merges.txt”.

data.name: VocabMergesConfiguration_VocabFile_Tooltip
data.value: Optional: Select the vocab file directly if no directory is specified.

data.name: WebBrowserFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Simulates a simple browser for displaying or analyzing web page content.

data.name: WebEventFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Responds to user interactions or events within a web component.

data.name: WebRequestFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Sends an HTTP request to a web server and processes the response.

data.name: WebRequestFlowBlock_IgnoreAlreadyProcessedContents
data.value: Do not reprocess already processed content

data.name: WebRequestFlowBlock_IgnoreAlreadyProcessedUrls
data.value: Do not reprocess already processed URLs

data.name: WebSelectorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Selects elements from a web page using CSS selectors or XPath.

data.name: XmlDocumentFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Creates a new XML document or loads an existing XML for further processing.

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_AssociatedNodeWriter
data.value: Reference node (via "Write XML node" Flow Block)

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_AssociatedXmlDocument
data.value: Linked XML document (via XML document Flow Block)

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Adds a new node to an existing XML document.

data.name: XmlDocumentOutputFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Saves the current XML document to an output field as a byte array or string.

data.name: XmlDocumentXPathSelector_Description
data.value: Selects one or more XML nodes based on an XPath expression.

data.name: WebBrowserFlowBlock_Timeout_Tooltip
data.value: Specifies the maximum number of seconds to wait for a browser operation before a timeout occurs.

data.name: WebBrowserFlowBlock_RetryLimit_Tooltip
data.value: Defines how many times a failed browser action will be retried before an error is returned.

data.name: WebBrowserFlowBlock_RetryTimeunit_Tooltip
data.value: The delay in milliseconds between retry attempts.

data.name: IndexFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Generates a sequential index value. Optionally resets the index to the initial value when the linked context flow block starts a new iteration.

data.name: IndexFlowBlock_InitialIndex_Tooltip
data.value: Defines the starting value of the index counter. The index begins with this value and is increased by one on each execution.

data.name: IndexFlowBlock_Context_Tooltip
data.value: Optional context flow block. If set, the index is reset to the initial value whenever this flow block starts a new iteration. If no context is specified, the index continues across the entire runtime execution.

data.name: JsonPathSelectorFlowBlock_Path_Tooltip
data.value: Path used to navigate through the JSON document. Use '/' to separate nodes. Object properties are addressed by their property name, array elements by a numeric index (e.g. 'participants/addresses/0').

data.name: MathFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Performs mathematical calculations based on an expression syntax and supports referenced fields as parameters.

data.name: MathFlowBlock_Expression_Tooltip
data.value: Mathematical expression using supported operators (+, -, *, /, parentheses). Field references can be used directly in the expression, e.g. "$Order::Quantity * 10".

data.name: TableWriterFlowBlock_ColumnAlreadyExists
data.value: A column with the name "{0}" already exists.

data.name: MemoryObject_Field_Tooltip
data.value: Specifies a stored or runtime field from which the textual or binary content is read or to which it is written (depending on the data type). Application-wide fields can be created via Window → Custom Fields → Custom Memory Fields. The content is then read from or stored in this field.

data.name: MemoryObject_Filename_Tooltip
data.value: Specifies the filename used for temporary storage, for example to enable live editing or to open the file in the default application.

data.name: OnnxBaseFlowBlock_AiExecutionProvider_Tooltip
data.value: Selects the ONNX execution provider for the entire application process. The value is read from the global option AI.Onnx.Provider. Supported values: Default (CPU), CUDA, DirectML, OpenVINO. Note: Once a provider is loaded, switching providers within the same process is not supported. Restart the application after changing this option.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Executes a prompt using a selected AI provider and returns the raw text response.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_Provider_Tooltip
data.value: Select the AI provider (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic) used to execute the prompt.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_PromptTemplate_Tooltip
data.value: The prompt to send to the AI provider. You can use FlowBlox field placeholders (e.g., %%Input%%) which are resolved at runtime.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_SystemInstruction_Tooltip
data.value: Optional system instruction to guide the assistant's behavior (if supported by the provider).

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_ModelOverride_Tooltip
data.value: Optional model name to override the provider's default model.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_Temperature_Tooltip
data.value: Controls randomness. Use 0 for deterministic results.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_MaxTokens_Tooltip
data.value: Optional limit for the generated output tokens.

data.name: AIPromptFlowBlock_TimeoutSecondsOverride_Tooltip
data.value: Optional timeout override for this flow block execution. If empty, the provider default timeout is used.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_Description
data.value: Generates a writable string property value (for example XPath, CSS selector, regex) using an AI prompt and test-driven expectations. Requires at least one test case for the target flow block, including expected value anchors and expected dataset count.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_Provider_Tooltip
data.value: Select the AI provider (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic) used to generate the target property value.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_PromptTemplate_Tooltip
data.value: The prompt template used for generation. Placeholders are resolved from test context and available fields.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_SystemInstruction_Tooltip
data.value: Optional system instruction to guide the AI output for this generation strategy.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_ModelOverride_Tooltip
data.value: Optional model name to override the provider default for this strategy.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_Temperature_Tooltip
data.value: Controls randomness of generated values. Use 0 for deterministic results.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_MaxTokens_Tooltip
data.value: Optional limit for generated output tokens.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_TimeoutSecondsOverride_Tooltip
data.value: Optional timeout override for this strategy execution. If empty, the provider default timeout is used.

data.name: AIPropertyValueGenerationStrategy_TargetPropertyName_Tooltip
data.value: Name of the writable string property on the flow block that should receive the generated value.

data.name: SequenceDetectionGenerationStrategy_Description
data.value: Generates a sequence detection pattern from test data. Requires at least two test cases with comparable input content, expected values, and an expectation for the number of result datasets.

data.name: AIProvider_ApiKey_Tooltip
data.value: The API key used to authenticate with the AI provider.

data.name: AIProvider_DefaultModel_Tooltip
data.value: The default model used when the request does not specify a model override.

data.name: AIProvider_TimeoutSeconds_Tooltip
data.value: Default timeout for AI requests in seconds.

data.name: AIProvider_BaseUrl_Tooltip
data.value: Optional base URL override for the AI provider API (advanced).

data.name: OpenAIProvider_OrganizationId_Tooltip
data.value: Optional OpenAI organization ID. Only needed for some account setups.

data.name: OpenAIProvider_ProjectId_Tooltip
data.value: Optional OpenAI project ID header used for project-scoped keys and usage attribution.

data.name: OpenAIProvider_StoreResponses_Tooltip
data.value: If enabled, the provider requests storing responses (if supported by the API/account).

data.name: Phi3AiTokenizer_Description
data.value: Tokenizer for Phi-3/Phi-3.5 (Llama/SentencePiece) based on tokenizer.model, including automatic resolution of special token IDs.

data.name: Phi3AiTokenizer_TokenizerModelPath_Tooltip
data.value: Path to the tokenizer.model (SentencePiece) file for the Phi-3/Phi-3.5 tokenizer.

data.name: OnnxGenAIFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Text generation using ONNX Runtime GenAI (KV cache / past_key_values / present) with incremental decoding for improved performance.

data.name: OnnxGenAIFlowBlock_TokenSelectionStrategy_Tooltip
data.value: Controls how the next token is selected from the logits (e.g., ArgMax, sampling).

data.name: AiTokenizerBase_EOSTokens_Tooltip
data.value: Optional list of EOS token IDs (comma/whitespace separated). If set, this list is used to stop generation; otherwise EOSToken is used. Example: 32007,32001,32000

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Runs text generation via ONNX Runtime GenAI (e.g., Phi-3.5) and supports chat templates.

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_ModelFolder_Tooltip
data.value: Folder containing the GenAI model (including genai.config, *.onnx and tokenizer assets).

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_TokenSelectionStrategy_Tooltip
data.value: Controls whether generation is deterministic or sampling-based (e.g., ArgMax vs. sampling).

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_MaxNewTokens_Tooltip
data.value: Maximum number of new tokens to generate (in addition to the prompt).

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_Temperature_Tooltip
data.value: Sampling temperature. 0 means deterministic generation (no sampling).

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_TopK_Tooltip
data.value: Top-K sampling. Limits choices to the K most likely tokens.

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_UseChatTemplate_Tooltip
data.value: If enabled, the prompt is built from SystemPrompt and UserPrompt using the chat template.

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_SystemPrompt_Tooltip
data.value: System instruction for the model (inserted into the chat template).

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_ChatTemplate_Tooltip
data.value: Template for chat prompts. Uses placeholders {SystemPrompt} and {UserPrompt}. Can be populated via toolbox.

data.name: OnnxRuntimeGenAIFlowBlock_AiExecutionProvider_Tooltip
data.value: Selects the ONNX execution provider for the entire application process. The value is read from the global option AI.Onnx.Provider. Supported values: Default (CPU), CUDA, DirectML, OpenVINO. Note: Once a provider is loaded, switching providers within the same process is not supported. Restart the application after changing this option.

data.name: NodeFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Groups multiple incoming paths into a single execution point. Use it to structure your flow and apply shared activation conditions to all following blocks.

data.name: ProjectOutputFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Creates project output datasets and stores them in the runtime. Each execution appends a new dataset under this block's name, using the configured field-to-property mapping.

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Runs another FlowBlox project in an isolated RunnerHost process. You can map input fields to the child project's user fields and option overrides, and optionally import child outputs back into this runtime.

data.name: ProjectOutputIteratorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Iterates an output group from the runner response JSON and maps output properties to fields to generate one result per dataset.

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_UpdateExistingNode_Tooltip
data.value: If enabled, the first existing node with the specified name is updated. If disabled, a new node is always appended (useful for list entries).

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_AssociatedXmlDocument_Tooltip
data.value: The linked XML document (via an XmlDocument flow block). If not set, the previous XmlDocument in the flow is used.

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_AssociatedNodeWriter_Tooltip
data.value: A linked XmlDocumentNodeWriter flow block. The most recently created or updated node of that block is used as the new root context, so XPath is evaluated relative to that node instead of the document root.

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_XPath_Tooltip
data.value: XPath expression to determine the target node. Example: /root/participant-list. If a NodeWriter is linked, the XPath is evaluated relative to the last created node.

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_NodeName_Tooltip
data.value: Name of the XML node to create or update, e.g. participant. Optionally, a single-level XPath expression with attribute filter can be used, e.g. participant[@id='1']. Multi-level XPath expressions are not allowed here.

data.name: XmlDocumentNodeWriterFlowBlock_Assignments_Tooltip
data.value: List of XPath assignments for attributes or child elements of the created node. Values can be static or resolved via field references.

data.name: FieldElement_StoreValueLocally_Tooltip
data.value: When enabled, the field value is not stored in the project file. It is stored in the local *.fblocaldata file instead (e.g., for input fields or local user data).

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_ProjectFile_Description
data.value: Select the FlowBlox project file to execute. Field placeholders are supported.

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_ProjectSpaceGuid_Description
data.value: Optional. If set, the project is loaded from Project Space. Field placeholders are supported.

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_ProjectSpaceVersion_Description
data.value: Optional. Specifies the stable version number. If set, the Project Space GUID must also be provided.

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_AbortOnError_Description
data.value: Abort execution if the child project reports an error.

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_AbortOnWarning_Description
data.value: Abort execution if the child project reports a warning.

data.name: ExecuteProjectFlowBlock_ParameterMappings_Description
data.value: Maps values as user fields or option overrides for the child project. Field placeholders are supported.

data.name: AssistantConfiguration_Description
data.value: Configure provider and request defaults for the AI Assistant.

data.name: AssistantConfiguration_Provider_Tooltip
data.value: Provider instance used for assistant requests.

data.name: AssistantConfiguration_Temperature_Tooltip
data.value: Sampling temperature in range 0-2. Lower values increase determinism.

data.name: AssistantConfiguration_MaxTokens_Tooltip
data.value: Optional max output token count for each model request.

data.name: AssistantConfiguration_MaxToolRounds_Tooltip
data.value: Upper bound for tool-call rounds per prompt execution.

data.name: AssistantConfiguration_EnableCommunicationProtocol_Tooltip
data.value: Writes a formatted communication protocol file with AI outputs and Tool API calls for each assistant execution.

data.name: ZipArchiveFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Creates a new ZIP archive or loads an existing archive from a data source.

data.name: ZipArchiveFileIteratorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Iterates recursively over all files in a ZIP archive and outputs file path and content.

data.name: ZipArchiveFileAppenderFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Writes a file to a ZIP archive at an absolute archive path.

data.name: ZipArchiveFileAppenderFlowBlock_ArchivePath_Tooltip
data.value: Absolute path in the ZIP archive, for example "/docs/reports".

data.name: ZipArchiveFileAppenderFlowBlock_FileName_Tooltip
data.value: Name of the file that will be created or replaced in the ZIP archive.

data.name: ZipArchiveOutputFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Outputs the ZIP archive as byte array.

data.name: FSDirectoryIteratorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Lists files from a directory and outputs metadata fields for each file.

data.name: FSDirectoryIteratorFlowBlock_FilterExpression_Tooltip
data.value: Use ';' separated wildcard patterns with '*' and '?'. Prefix a pattern with '!' to exclude it. Matching is applied to file name and relative path. Example: *.txt;logs/*.log;!archive/*

data.name: ZipArchiveCreatorFlowBlock_Description
data.value: Creates a new in-memory ZIP archive in the selected ZIP archive managed object.
